_comment: WC2026 Round of 32, 2026-07-01, Atlanta Stadium. KNOCKOUT: no draw -- level after 90' -> extra time -> penalties, so the deliverable is who ADVANCES. Winner meets Mexico in the Round of 16. Routes: England won Group L (4-2 Croatia, 0-0 Ghana, 2-0 Panama; 7 pts, GF 6 GA 2, rating 91) -- strong, but the 0-0 vs Ghana showed an organized block CAN frustrate them. DR Congo qualified as a BEST THIRD from Group K (1-1 Portugal, 0-1 Colombia, 3-1 Uzbekistan; 4 pts, GF 4 GA 3, GD +1, rating 70) -- a decent side with real attacking threat (Wissa, Bakambu; they held Portugal and put 3 past Uzbekistan) but they CONCEDE (GA 3), so NOT a pure low block like Ghana. England the heavy favourite by class (21-rating gap); DR Congo is more open/leaky than Ghana, so England should break through -- a favourite that wins, likely with a goal or two, and DR Congo can nick one. Lower shootout risk than the round's tight low-block ties, but not zero (England can be frustrated). Home = England (nominal; neutral venue). Cards not modelled (referee TBD).

meta.stakes: Single-elimination: level after 90' -> extra time -> penalties. Winner faces Mexico in the R16. England a heavy favourite (won Group L, rating 91) vs a decent, attacking-but-leaky DR Congo (best third, held Portugal, but concedes). England should win, DR Congo can score -- a favourite+goals lean, lower shootout risk than the tight ties.

home.name: England
notes: Strong (rating 91); won the group, but the 0-0 vs Ghana shows a block can frustrate them. attack 1.32.
Heavy favourite vs a leakier, more open side than Ghana -> should break through with goals.

away.name: DR Congo
notes: Real attacking threat (Wissa, Bakambu; held Portugal 1-1, 3-1 Uzbekistan). attack 0.90 -- can score, not a pure low block.
Concedes (GA 3, lost to Colombia). defense 1.05 -> England should score.
Clear underdog but capable of a goal; lower ET/penalty risk than the tight ties.

_recal: First pass sat 6 pts below the market on England (60.7% vs ~67%): I over-credited DR Congo's attacking threat -- England (91 vs 70) is a heavy favourite the market prices clearly. Lifted ENG 1.90 -> 2.10 and trimmed DRC 0.88 -> 0.80 to align (don't fade an elite favourite); still a favourite+goals lean.
